items.title: AI chip maker SambaNova raises $1B at $11B valuation, 5 months after last mega round
items.summary: AI chip maker SambaNova has raised at an $11B valuation months after Intel was rumored to be trying to buy it for about $1.6 billion.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Moto G77 Power Launched in India With 7,000mAh Battery, 50-Megapixel Rear Camera: Price, Specifications
items.summary: Moto G77 Power has been launched in India. The smartphone is scheduled to go on sale in India on July 13 via Flipkart and the Motorola India online store. The Moto G77 Power is...

items.title: Shadow library OceanofPDF is down
